name: Aurora Wireless Headphones
description: Over-ear wireless headphones with 40 mm drivers, 32 hours of battery, and memory-foam cups that disappear on long sessions. A soft matte finish keeps fingerprints off and the folding hinge makes them easy to toss in a bag.

name: Pulse Smartwatch
description: A titanium-framed smartwatch with an always-on AMOLED display, 7-day battery, and built-in GPS for runs that don't need your phone. Tracks heart rate, sleep, and 90+ workout modes.

name: Clack 75% Mechanical Keyboard
description: A compact 75% layout with hot-swap sockets, gasket-mounted PCB, and a rotary volume knob. Tactile linear switches ship pre-lubed; PBT double-shot keycaps give every keystroke a satisfying thock.

name: Echo Portable Speaker
description: A pocket-sized Bluetooth speaker with surprising low-end and 18 hours of playback. IP67 rated for poolside, shower, or beach use, and it pairs with a second unit for true stereo.

name: Lumen 4K Webcam
description: A 4K webcam with a 1/1.8" Sony sensor, HDR, and a physical privacy shutter. Locks focus fast, handles low light gracefully, and clips onto any monitor bezel.

name: Hub 9 USB-C Dock
description: Nine ports in a brushed aluminum shell: 4K HDMI, gigabit ethernet, SD/microSD, three USB-A, and 100 W pass-through charging. Plug in once and your desk is done.

name: Mute Pro Earbuds
description: Noise-canceling earbuds with adaptive ANC, a transparent mode that feels natural on calls, and six hours of playback per charge. The case is the size of a matchbox.

name: Everyday Cotton Tee
description: A heavyweight 240 gsm combed cotton tee with a relaxed fit and a ribbed crew neck that keeps its shape wash after wash. Cut to drape well over jeans or under a jacket.

name: Quiet Fleece Hoodie
description: A brushed-back fleece hoodie in midweight 380 gsm cotton blend. Kangaroo pocket, flat drawcords, and a drop shoulder — no logos, no slogans.

name: Field Denim Jacket
description: A 14 oz selvedge denim jacket cut a bit longer than a classic Type III. Copper rivets, chain-stitched hems, and two chest pockets big enough for a phone and a notebook.

name: Lane Canvas Sneakers
description: A low-top canvas sneaker with a vulcanized rubber sole and a cushioned insole that makes all-day wear painless. Off-white upper, gum sole, unfussy.

name: Dugout Baseball Cap
description: A washed cotton twill cap with a pre-curved brim and a brass slider closure. Broken in from the first wear.

name: Highland Wool Scarf
description: Woven in Scotland from a lightweight lambswool with hand-knotted tassels. Wide enough to double over for serious cold, soft enough to wear all day.

name: Pace Running Shorts
description: A 5-inch running short in a light ripstop shell with a liner that actually breathes. Zip back pocket, elastic drawcord waist, and reflective trim at the hem.

name: Kiln Ceramic Mug
description: A 12 oz stoneware mug with a matte speckled glaze and a handle sized for a whole fist, not just a finger. Dishwasher and microwave safe.

name: Press 34 French Press
description: A 34 oz double-walled stainless French press that keeps coffee hot for an hour without cooking it. Fine mesh filter, four cup capacity, dishwasher safe.

name: Foundry Cast Iron Skillet
description: A 10-inch pre-seasoned cast iron skillet, sand cast in a single piece. Heats evenly, holds heat forever, and gets better the more you cook in it.

name: Grain Bamboo Cutting Board
description: An end-grain bamboo cutting board with a deep juice groove and built-in side handles. Knife-friendly, naturally antimicrobial, and easy on the wrists.

name: Soft Linen Throw
description: A stonewashed Belgian linen throw blanket with a loose weave and hand-fringed edges. Light enough for summer naps, layered well in winter.

name: Beam LED Desk Lamp
description: An articulated LED desk lamp with a touch-dimmable bar, five color temperatures, and a magnetic base that lets the arm swing in any direction. USB-A passthrough on the back.
